subject: Phase documentation continuity
fact: Implementation phases should maintain docs/phase-<n>/README.md files that summarize scope, audits, reusable decisions, and any deferred validation; docs/phase-0 remains the contract baseline, and active implementation phases now have phase-1 through phase-6 directories in docs/.
reason: Future work and code reviews need a consistent place to look for phase-level decisions and deferred checks so the repo does not drift back into undocumented implementation phases.
